---
title: "hunter.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/skills/local/SkillHunter/hunter.py"
loc: 64
complexity: 9
logic_score: 2.07
style_score: 3.76
intel_score: 6.40
overall_score: 4.27
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating SkillHunter, __init__.

## Interaction Protocol
Import SkillHunter and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 14 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [shutil](file://shutil)
- [stat](file://stat)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.sentinel._bootstrap](file://src.sentinel._bootstrap)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.core.promotion_registry](file://src.core.promotion_registry)

### Exports
- `SkillHunter`
- `__init__`
- `_remove_readonly`
- `ingest`
